title: Grafix DIY Unicorn Jewellery Box - DIY Wooden Jewellery Box - Kids Craft Kit for Girls - Velvet Interior - Comes with Paint, Brush, Mosaic Diamonds and Stencils
features: ✔ DECORATE YOUR OWN UNICORN JEWELRY BOX: DIY jewellery box for kids - the perfect craft project that combines creativity and utility.
✔ UNICORN MAGIE: Ideal for children who love unicorns. This set offers endless decorating fun with paint, brushes, sticky mosaics and more!
✔ LUXURIOUS VELVET LINING: Make sure your cherished jewellery is well protected from scratches and beautifully presented in the high-quality velvet interior of the box.
✔ CRAFT BOX WITH VERSATILE DECORATIVE ELEMENTS: Contains everything you need, including paint, brushes, sticking diamonds, stickers and stencils for a unique masterpiece.
✔ PERFECT GIFT FOR CREATIVE CHILDREN: A great gift idea for birthdays, holidays or special occasions, especially for those who love unicorns or horse crafts.
